inputs.multi_shot.storyboard_1_prompt: Ultra‑realistic boxing match inside a packed arena at night. Two muscular male boxers in bright trunks and gloves exchange fast punches at close range, sweat flying off under the harsh spotlights. Camera: tight low‑angle close‑up circling slowly around them, shallow depth of field, background crowd and lights blurred, intense facial expressions, heavy breathing, hyper‑detailed skin and gloves.
inputs.multi_shot.storyboard_2_prompt: The fight escalates as both boxers trade powerful hooks and uppercuts, moving around the ring. Camera: begins with a medium shot showing both fighters from the waist up, then smoothly pulls back to a wider shot revealing the full ring, roaring crowd, flashing arena screens and camera flashes, with dramatic slow‑motion on one big punch, cinematic lighting, 4K, high frame rate, dynamic sports broadcast style.
